title: Section 34
content: 1[34. Extra territorial jurisdiction.--An extradition offence committed by any person in a foreign State shall be deemed to have been committed in India and such person shall be liable to be prosecuted in India for such offence].
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 17, ibid., for section 34 (w.e.f. 18-12-1993).
